sources.full_text: Leadership's response amounts to 'de facto support' through 'delay, hand-wringing, and conspicuous silence.'

sources.title: MIT Sloan Study on Inflation Drivers
sources.author: MIT Sloan School
sources.full_text: The overwhelming driver of that burst of inflation in 2022 was federal spending. 42% of inflation was directly attributable to government spending.

sources.title: Penn Wharton Budget Model - IRA Analysis
sources.author: Penn Wharton Budget Model
sources.full_text: The impact on inflation is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

sources.title: Iraq Survey Group Final Report

sources.full_text: ISG has not found evidence that Saddam possessed WMD stocks in 2003.

sources.title: Pentagon Report on Iran Proxy Attacks
sources.author: Department of Defense
sources.full_text: At least 216 attacks against U.S. forces in Iraq, Syria, and Jordan between October 2023 and mid-2025, using at least 372 rockets, missiles, and drones.

sources.title: CDC Provisional Overdose Death Counts
sources.author: CDC
sources.full_text: 105,303 Americans died from drug overdoses in 2023. 72,776 died from fentanyl alone in 2023.
